notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the buildah SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 33 CVEs: CVE-2018-25091, CVE-2021-33198, CVE-2021-34558, CVE-2021-4024, CVE-2022-2879, and 28 more.
